description: LC-S10B — Sprint 6 protection for proven launch-core slice (CHECK 2/4/5/6, leakage guards)

launch_core_check2_lifestyle_visible_pay.description: Lifestyle_context must show plain-English alcohol body_overview; baseline must not; no internal lifestyle slug in user-facing narrative.

launch_core_check4_statin_lipid_lowering.description: statin_on must resolve lipid_lowering_statin; statin_off must not; CV consequence must change without claiming score/ranking changed.

launch_core_check5_wave1_contradiction.description: Wave 1 band_label vs consequence_sentence_head polarity coherence on proving fingerprints.

launch_core_check6_lead_alignment.description: Clinician primary concern and retail summary anchor on homocysteine lead family for AB/VR baseline.

launch_core_user_facing_slug_and_signal_.description: No lifestyle rationale slug, WHY fallback debug, or raw signal_* ids in compact proving user-facing fields.

statin_signal_isolation.description: Statin context changes narrative framing only; analytical top findings and band labels preserved.

unit_governance_lc_s8d.description: UK/SI unit governance, HbA1c identity, haematocrit L/L, BUN→urea, frontend no conversion.

uploaded_panel_fidelity_fe_s8e.description: Layer C Mode A uploaded-panel fidelity — renderer-only, equivalent observations visible, canonical dials unchanged.

legacy_insights_placeholder_leakage.description: Launch-core API must not emit legacy insights[] placeholder text ('summarise structured signals').

domain_narrative_without_active_signal.description: Blood sugar domain must not show early-IR pattern copy when active_signal_ids is empty.

apoa1_directionality_misclassification.description: Elevated ApoA1 alone must not fire signal_apoa1_cardio_risk or appear in wave1_aligned_drivers.

low_alt_false_alarm.description: ALT below lab lower bound must not drive critical liver domain score or review band.

consumer_payload_internal_sprint_string_.description: No internal sprint-management strings in consumer_domain_scores raw_evidence_refs or sentences.

domain_band_headline_polarity_contradict.description: Stable/strong band with high-confidence copy must not use 'not a simple all-clear' headline without active signals or contributor conflict.

domain_active_signal_false_claim.description: Blood sugar domain must not carry early-IR pattern copy when active_signal_ids is empty.

governance_label_user_visible_leakage.description: No raw signal_* ids or internal lifestyle bridge slugs in consumer narrative or domain score sentences.

lifestyle_bridge_internal_code_leakage.description: Active lifestyle bridges must not leak rationale_codes or internal bridge slug strings into consumer narrative or domain sentences.

lifestyle_visible_payoff_missing.description: Contrasting lifestyle profiles on the same AB panel must surface governed body_overview differences and non-identical system_modifiers.

mock_mode_personalisation_overclaim.description: Consumer surfaces must not use 'your measured' or AI-personalised narrative overclaim phrases.

direction_sensitive_marker_false_alarm.description: Direction-governed markers must not false-alarm on clinically benign deviations (e.g. low enzymes).

low_enzyme_false_alarm.description: Low ALT/AST/GGT/ALP below lab lower bound must not produce critical scoring.

protective_high_marker_penalised.description: High HDL/ApoA1 above lab upper bound must not be penalised solely for being high.

hardcoded_biomarker_scoring_exception.description: No biomarker-specific hardcoded scoring bypass in rules.py; directionality must be policy-driven.

scoring_signal_directionality_conflation.description: Lab scoring directionality policy is SSOT-governed and does not require signal-library changes in LC-S14 scope.
scoring_signal_directionality_conflation.note: Guards policy load + absence of hardcoded alt bypass; signal firing unchanged by design.
